EXPRESSION:
VAR __highest =
    MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Date] ), [__profit] )
VAR __lowest =
    MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Date] ), [__profit] )
VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        __highest = [__profit], "#108372",
        __lowest = [__profit], "#F15628",
        BLANK ()
    )
RETURN
    Result

VAR Period =
    DATESINPERIOD ( 'Date'[Date], MAX ( 'Date'[Date] ), - [Selected_Months], MONTH )
VAR TotalProfit =
    CALCULATE ( [Selected Measure], Period )
VAR Mon =
    CALCULATE ( DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Date'[Month] ), Period )
RETURN
    DIVIDE ( TotalProfit, Mon, BLANK () )

VAR __selected =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__cogs", "COGS",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__gross_sales", "Gross sales",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__profit", "Profit",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__sales", "Sales",
        SELECTEDVALUE ( Slicer_Table[__measure] ) = "__units_sold", "Units sold"
    )
RETURN
    SELECTEDVALUE ( Selected_Months[Value] ) & " Month Moving average for " & __selected

VAR Months =
    DATEDIFF ( DATE ( 2018, 9, 1 ), TODAY (), MONTH ) - 1
VAR Years =
    ROUNDDOWN ( Months / 12, 0 )
VAR Result =
    CONCATENATE (
        CONCATENATE ( CONCATENATE ( Years, " Years, " ), Months - ( Years * 12 ) ),
        " Months"
    )
RETURN
    Result

VAR MaxFilters = 3
VAR __dumpfilters =
    IF (
        ISFILTERED ( 'Calculation group'[Ordinal] ),
        VAR ___f =
            FILTERS ( 'Calculation group'[Ordinal] )
        VAR ___r =
            COUNTROWS ( ___f )
        VAR ___t =
            TOPN ( MaxFilters, ___f, 'Calculation group'[Ordinal] )
        VAR ___d =
            CONCATENATEX ( ___t, 'Calculation group'[Ordinal], ", " )
        VAR ___x =
            "'Calculation group'[Ordinal] = " & ___d
                & IF ( ___r > MaxFilters, ", ... [" & ___r & " items selected]" ) & " "
        RETURN
            ___x & UNICHAR ( 13 )
                & UNICHAR ( 10 )
    )
        & IF (
            ISFILTERED ( 'Calculation group'[Time Intelligence] ),

FORMAT (
    DIVIDE (
        [__discounts],
        CALCULATE ( [__discounts], DATEADD ( 'Date'[Date], -1, MONTH ) )
    ) - 1,
    "0.0%"
) & " | "
    & FORMAT (
        [__discounts] - CALCULATE ( [__discounts], DATEADD ( 'Date'[Date], -1, MONTH ) ),
        "#,,#K"
    )

SWITCH (
    TRUE (),
    DIVIDE (
        [__discounts],
        CALCULATE ( [__discounts], DATEADD ( 'Date'[Date], -1, MONTH ) )
    ) - 1 < 0, "Green",
    "Red"
)

VAR __highest =
    MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Date] ), [__profit] )
VAR __lowest =
    MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date'[Date] ), [__profit] )
VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        [__profit] = __highest, [__profit],
        [__profit] = __lowest, [__profit],
        BLANK ()
    )
RETURN
    Result

VAR Result =
    [__profit]
        + ( RAND () * [__profit] )
        - ( RAND () * [__profit] )
RETURN
    ABS ( Result )

VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        DIVIDE (
            ABS ( [__profit] + ( RAND () * [__profit] ) - ( RAND () * [__profit] ) ),
            [__profit]
        ) > 0, "🔼",
        DIVIDE (
            ABS ( [__profit] + ( RAND () * [__profit] ) - ( RAND () * [__profit] ) ),
            [__profit]
        ) < 0, "🔽",
        BLANK ()
    )
RETURN
    SWITCH ( TRUE (), HASONEVALUE ( 'Date'[Month] ), Result )

VAR _1D =
    CALCULATE (
        [__profit],
        OFFSET ( -1, ALL ( 'Date'[Date] ), ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Date], ASC ) )
    )
VAR _1M =
    CALCULATE (
        [__profit],
        OFFSET (
            -1,
            ALL ( 'Date'[Year Month Number], 'Date'[Year Month] ),
            ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Year Month Number], ASC )
        )
    )
VAR _1Y =
    CALCULATE (
        [__profit],
        OFFSET ( -1, ALL ( 'Date'[Year] ), ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Year], ASC ) )
    )
VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE,
        ISINSCOPE ( 'Date'[Date] ), _1D,
        ISINSCOPE ( 'Date'[Year Month] ), _1M,
        ISINSCOPE ( 'Date'[Year] ), _1Y
    )
RETURN
    Result

VAR _1D =
    CALCULATE (
        [__profit],
        WINDOW (
            1,
            REL,
            1,
            REL,
            SUMMARIZE ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Date] ),
            ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Date], DESC )
        )
    )
VAR _1M =
    CALCULATE (
        [__profit],
        WINDOW (
            1,
            REL,
            1,
            REL,
            SUMMARIZE (
                ALLSELECTED ( 'Date' ),
                'Date'[Year Month Number],
                'Date'[Year Month]
            ),
            ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Year Month Number], DESC )
        )
    )
VAR _1Y =
    CALCULATE (
        [__profit],
        WINDOW (
            1,
            REL,
            1,
            REL,
            SUMMARIZE ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Year] ),
            ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Year], DESC )
        )
    )
VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE,
        ISINSCOPE ( 'Date'[Date] ), _1D,
        ISINSCOPE ( 'Date'[Year Month] ), _1M,
        ISINSCOPE ( 'Date'[Year] ), _1Y
    )
RETURN
    Result

VAR _0D =
    CALCULATE (
        [__profit],
        OFFSET ( -0, ALL ( 'Date'[Date] ), ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Date], ASC ) )
    )
VAR _0M =

RETURN

RETURN
    Result

SWITCH (
    TRUE (),
    NOT ISBLANK ( [OFFSET-0] ) && NOT ISBLANK ( [OFFSET-1] ), DIVIDE ( [OFFSET-0], [OFFSET-1] ) - 1
)

SWITCH (
    TRUE (),
    NOT ISBLANK ( [WINDOW -0] ) && NOT ISBLANK ( [WINDOW -1] ), DIVIDE ( [WINDOW -0], [WINDOW -1] ) - 1
)

CALCULATE (
    [__profit],
    WINDOW (
        0,
        ABS,
        0,
        REL,
        SUMMARIZE ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Date' ), 'Date'[Date] ),
        ORDERBY ( 'Date'[Date], ASC )
    )
)

VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        DIVIDE (
            ABS ( [__profit] + ( RAND () * [__profit] ) - ( RAND () * [__profit] ) ),
            [__profit]
        ) > 0, "🔼",
        DIVIDE (
            ABS ( [__profit] + ( RAND () * [__profit] ) - ( RAND () * [__profit] ) ),
            [__profit]
        ) < 0, "🔽",
        BLANK ()
    )
RETURN
    SWITCH ( TRUE (), HASONEVALUE ( 'Date'[Month] ), Result )

VAR Result =
    [__profit]
        + ( RAND () * [__profit] )
        - ( RAND () * [__profit] )
RETURN
    ABS ( Result )

VAR __curr = [__profit]
VAR __prev = [__PREV_MONTH]
VAR Result =
    SWITCH ( TRUE (), __curr > __prev, __curr, __prev )
RETURN
    Result

SWITCH (
    TRUE (),
    NOT ISBLANK ( [__PREV_MONTH] ), FORMAT ( DIVIDE ( [__profit], [__PREV_MONTH] ) - 1, "0.0%" )
) & " | "
    & SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        NOT ISBLANK ( [__PREV_MONTH] )
            && DIVIDE ( [__profit], [__PREV_MONTH] ) - 1 > 0, "🔼",
        NOT ISBLANK ( [__PREV_MONTH] )
            && DIVIDE ( [__profit], [__PREV_MONTH] ) - 1 < 0, "🔽",
        BLANK ()
    )

VAR __LastDateWithData =
    CALCULATE (
        MAXX ( { MAX ( 'financials (web)'[Date] ) }, ''[Value] ),
        REMOVEFILTERS ()
    )
VAR __FirstDateVisible =
    MIN ( 'Date'[Date] )
VAR __Result = __FirstDateVisible <= __LastDateWithData
RETURN
    __Result

SWITCH (
    TRUE (),
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Slicer_Table'[__measure] ) = "__cogs", [__cogs],
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Slicer_Table'[__measure] ) = "__gross_sales", [__gross_sales],
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Slicer_Table'[__measure] ) = "__profit", [__profit],
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Slicer_Table'[__measure] ) = "__sales", [__sales],
    SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Slicer_Table'[__measure] ) = "__units_sold", [__units_sold],
    "Select Measure"
)

VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__cogs", [__cogs],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__gross_sales", [__gross_sales],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__profit", [__profit],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__sales", [__sales],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__units_sold", [__units_sold],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__discounts", SUM ( 'financials (web)'[Discounts] )
    )
RETURN
    IF (
        MAX ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Measure group] ) = "Measure group 1",
        Result,
        BLANK ()
    )

VAR Result =
    SWITCH (
        TRUE (),
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__cogs", [__cogs],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__gross_sales", [__gross_sales],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__profit", [__profit],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__sales", [__sales],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__units_sold", [__units_sold],
        SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Value2] ) = "__discounts", SUM ( 'financials (web)'[Discounts] )
    )
RETURN
    IF (
        MAX ( 'Multi Measure Table'[Measure group] ) = "Measure group 2",
        Result,
        BLANK ()
    )
